title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
